arts.ttl: Arsenal target Joshua Kimmich receives formal offer to leave Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The uncertain future of Bayern Munich's Joshua Kimmich continues to dominate transfer headlines around Europe.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich pondering a move for Liverpool target Castello Lukeba
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Bayern Munich are pondering a potential move for Castello Lukeba (22) during the summer transfer window. The RB Leipzig defender is expected to leave Eastern Germany in…

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Newcastle among clubs targeting £38m Bayern Munich attacker?
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle United are reportedly among the clubs tracking a £38-rated Bayern Munich attacker ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich 'not keen on Arsenal move' but Bayern Munich star 'has a concrete offer' from elsewhere
arts.sum: The 30-year-old midfielder has less than four months remaining on his current contract with Bayern Munich , who have offered him an extension but so far been underwhelmed by his response.

arts.ttl: Man City pursuit of Wirtz 'ESCALATES' as 'FAKE NEWS' blasted
arts.sum: Man City pursuit of Wirtz 'ESCALATES' as 'FAKE NEWS' blasted Earlier on Wednesday, German outlet BILD claimed that Man City had sought to 'escalate' the battle for Wirtz by hiring well-known intermediary Giovanni Branchini to get in touch with the player's family.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen: Live stream, game time thread, odds, prediction, how to watch
arts.sum: Every time Bayern plays Leverkusen, it feels like the most important match of the season. Both Bundesliga matches ended in a draw and Leverkusen knocked out Bayern in the DFB-Pokal.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich yet to respond to PSG contract offer amid talks over Bayern Munich extension
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are long-time admirers of Joshua Kimmich (30) and they have now made their move. Bild and Sky Sports Germany have both revealed that, with the German international’s contract expiring this summer, PSG…

arts.ttl: War of the War Chest: Bayern Munich sporting boss Max Eberl reportedly draws criticism from supervisory board
arts.sum: According to a new report, some members who sit on the supervisory board — which approves transfers and contract packages — believe that board member for sport Max Eberl is playing too fast and loose on the money side. Some supervisory board members are said to be critical of Max Eberl in one point: it is said that he’s sometimes too reckless on the financial aspect when it comes to transfers and squad planning - and that’s at a time when the club’s fixed deposit account is no longer as full as it was in the past.

arts.ttl: Breaking: PSG submits offer to Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich per report
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport Bild journalists Christian Falk and Tobi Altschäffl (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Paris Saint-Germain has submitted an offer to Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich. ✅ Joshua Kimmich (30) has a concrete offer of Paris Saint-Germaim for Summer @BILD_Sport @altobelli13 pic.twitter.com/j5krlKekGD

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayer Leverkusen XI v Bayern Munich: No recognised striker for B04?
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso is expected to revert to a back-four when his Bayer Leverkusen side face Bayern Munich at the Allianz Arena in the UEFA Champions League Round of 16 tonight.…
